EmbedDescriptions.PreUpdate:
An unpublished Roblox version has been detected on the `LIVE` channel!
This means the update is **NOT** released yet, but will be within ~24 hours.
EmbedDescriptions.Update:
A new Roblox version has been detected on the `LIVE` channel!
This means the update **IS** released! Most externals / executors will be down temporarily.*
EmbedDescriptions.Revert:
Roblox has reverted to a previous version on the `LIVE` channel!
This means that some exploits or externals **MAY** be down temporarily.
